title: The Trap Tightens Around the Alliance
description: Pages 21–22 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #25, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #6 as the Straw Hats and Law reach Dressrosa, split into teams, and step into Doflamingo’s territory while the Mera Mera no Mi appears as bait.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who is that!! Does he know who he's messing with!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He's gone and stuck his neck out, again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: D... DID I REALLY WIN?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I don't know who you are, but thank you for your kindness.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah, don't worry about. I just called it like I saw it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're lucky, huh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: But old man, you look pretty strong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're being real rude here, brat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If we say it's black, it's black !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's not like he can see anyway, so who cares!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're getting in the way, so just die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Chew Chew

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I won't let you do that!! Get out of the way, now, young man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll be sending these people down to hell, now ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: UHA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: JGA:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hea... heavy...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I... I'm being cru- shed

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wahhhh how

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wow, look at that hole.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehh!!? What is that guy!!! What did he do!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...that this world`s filth may go unseen...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Is one pleasure known to the blind....

summary: Pages 21–22 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
